6. Conclusions
Based on the comprehensive evaluation conducted using
Galileo HAS correction data collected from Days 333 to
339 of 2023across56globalstations,thefollowingconclu-
sions were drawn:
In the initial service stage, the precision of the HAS
orbit and clock correction data is slightly lower than that
of the RT products from the commonly used WHU,
CAS, and CNE analysis centers. For SSR products
received with HAS service, GPS has a lower sa
